---
title: "EncoderDispatch"
---

## Overview

`EncoderDispatch` provides type-safe dispatch from encoder parameter variants to
`ImageEncoder` / `Point2DEncoder` / … encode calls. It replaces string-based
`encoder_id` switches in `SlotAssembler` and centralizes factory-name /
DataManager-type mapping.

**Location:** `src/DeepLearning/channel_encoding/EncoderDispatch.hpp`

## API

| Function | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `encodeToTensor()` | Encode pre-fetched source data using typed or variant params |
| `isImageEncoder()` | Whether the active encoder targets MediaData |
| `dataTypeForEncoder()` | Map params to `MediaData`, `PointData`, etc. |
| `encoderFactoryName()` | Map params to registry name (`ImageEncoder`, …) |
| `encoderParamsFromFactoryName()` | Default params from model `recommended_encoder` hint |

## Types

- `EncoderParamsVariant` — `std::variant` of all `*EncoderParams` structs
- `EncodingSourceVariant` — image pixels, point vector, mask, or line source data

`SlotBindingData` in workspace JSON stores a nested tagged `encoder` field
(reflect-cpp), matching `DynamicInputSlotParams`.
